explanation: Inserted quotes around the argument to test if the Sigma rule can detect the command line with additional formatting.
Original command line with no mutation applied for baseline comparison.
Inserted extra space before the argument to test parsing robustness of the Sigma rule.
Appended redundant characters after the argument to test if the Sigma rule can distinguish between valid and invalid input.
Used an alternative representation of the 'My Computer' folder using its CLSID, which is functionally equivalent to 'shell:mycomputerfolder'.
Invoked explorer.exe through cmd.exe using the /c switch to test if the Sigma rule detects the parent-child relationship correctly.
Used PowerShell to start explorer.exe with the specified argument to test if the Sigma rule detects execution via PowerShell.
Used PowerShell Core (pwsh) to start explorer.exe with the specified argument to test if the Sigma rule detects execution via PowerShell Core.
